% Operational Checklists & Templates
% Copy-paste friendly leader checklist, nomination checklist, campaign brief, evidence template

Leader Checklist (before assigning tasks)
- Did I explain the task goal, deliverable, timeline, and acceptance criteria?
- Did I obtain explicit consent for mandatory commitments?
- Is evidence requirement defined (what counts as success)?
- Have I disclosed any conflict of interest?
- Did I record the assignment and evidence expectations for audit?

Promotion Nomination Checklist
- Candidate handle & current rank
- Current total XP and date
- Time-in-rank duration
- Evidence package (deliverables, links, client acceptances)
- Peer references (2 recommended)
- Discipline reviewer sign-off
- Nomination submitted to panel (yes/no)

Campaign Brief (short)
- Title:
- Objective:
- Target audience:
- Channels:
- Deliverables & roles:
- Timeline:
- Approval checklist:
- KPIs:

Evidence Submission Template
- Deliverable link:
- 100-word summary:
- Acceptance/test notes:
- Reviewer handle & sign-off:
- Timestamp:

Publishing Approval Form (for high-impact content)
- Campaign Lead:
- Media reviewer:
- Commander sign-off:
- Legal sign-off (if required):
- Scheduled publish time & accounts:
- Approval timestamp & signers:

Channel Onboarding Card (one-line)
- Confirm Rank ≥ Adept; media primer complete; Code of Conduct accepted; mentor assigned.

End of file.
